name: AMERISAFE INC
summary: AMERISAFE, Inc. is a specialty workers compensation insurance holding company incorporated in Texas, focused on small to mid-sized employers in hazardous industries including construction, trucking, logging and lumber, agriculture, services, manufacturing, and maritime. Operating since 1986, it provides workers compensation coverage through three insurance subsidiaries (AIIC, SOCI, AIICTX), offering underwriting, safety services, claims management, and premium audit services across 27 active states.

products.name: Workers Compensation Insurance
products.description: State and federal workers compensation coverage for small to mid-sized employers in hazardous industries, providing wage replacement, medical care, and disability benefits.

products.name: Safety Services
products.description: Proactive worksite safety reviews and on-site surveys conducted by field safety professionals to promote loss prevention and safer workplaces.

products.name: Claims Management
products.description: In-house intensive claims management emphasizing personalized approach, quality medical treatment, and rapid claim closure.

products.name: Premium Audit Services
products.description: Audit services to calculate appropriate premiums and monitor payroll patterns for underwriting, safety, or fraud concerns.

products.name: GEAUX
products.description: Proprietary underwriting and agency management system supporting risk selection and business administration.

products.name: ICAMS
products.description: Customized operational system supporting billing, claims, and audit functions, feeding an analytical data warehouse.
